positive: A vibrant retro synthwave scene depicting a lone, stylish figure standing in front of a neon-lit grid landscape under a purple and pink sunset. The background features stylized palm trees and a vintage jukebox. The aesthetic is heavily inspired by 1980s vaporwave art and synthwave album covers. Dominant colors: magenta, cyan, deep violet, electric blue. Style: Vector art, digital painting, neon glow effect, highly atmospheric, cinematic lighting, retro futurism, geometric patterns, sharp focus, 4k quality, maximalist design.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realistic people, photorealism, grunge, messy, dirt
